title: ElytraSwapper
description: Swap your elytra in a breeze! Just press the Y button on your keyboard.
body:
Want to swap your elytra and chestplate in a breeze? Look no further!

Once this mod is installed, just press the **Y** button on your keyboard.

It's that easy!

Works on singleplayer and multiplayer!

This mod does not require any additional dependencies besides FabricAPI.
